title: MARAG-R1: Multi-tool Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation via Reinforcement Learning

defines.name: MARAG-R1
defines.definition: A unified multi-tool agentic RAG framework that learns to coordinate multiple retrieval mechanisms with reinforcement learning for broader external information access and global reasoning.

problem: Existing RAG systems typically rely on a single retriever with fixed top-k selection, which limits access to comprehensive external information needed for corpus-level reasoning.
